title: Marketplace Manager - Reliance Digital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Reliance Digital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Reliance Digital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
